meaning: n.足,底部,英尺,音步(英诗),步调,步兵,末尾vt.走在...上,支付,给...换底,结算vi.步行,跳舞,总计
examples: He shifted from foot to foot.
Sam stamped his foot in anger.
Boston is a compact city, which makes it easy to get around on foot.
He is comfortably sized, barely cresting the five-foot barrier, shaven of head and broad of smile.
